title: Lava Tools
body:
This mod adds 5 new tools that are crafted from lava buckets.
They have the same stats as iron tools, but with a lava-themed twist!

Features

1. Lava Sword
2. Lava Pickaxe
3. Lava Axe
4. Lava Shovel
5. Lava Hoe



Tools function exactly like iron tools. Just a fun, lightweight addition for players who want lava-themed gear.
